data.content: Plan: rename persisted dispatch mode enum values from `actions`/`pools` to meaningful names (recommended `basic`/`advanced`), add legacy-value normalization during settings load so existing TOML continues to parse, then update schema/runtime/UI/scripts/docs/tests that serialize or compare the mode. Key files identified: `src/lib/schemas.ts`, `src/lib/settings.ts`, `src/lib/terminal-manager.ts`, `src/components/settings-sheet.tsx`, `src/components/settings-dispatch-section.tsx`, `src/lib/openapi/schemas.ts`, `scripts/setup.sh`, `scripts/agent-wizard.sh`, `src/lib/__tests__/settings.test.ts`, `src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts`, plus README/API docs. Main risk is config breakage without read-time migration.
